entries.content:
If nothing happened at level one, well, then your heart—like the casserole—remains unscorched. Calmly observe, dear: low shocks rarely rattle the china. Best brace with a polite smile and keep an eye on the dials; the world, after all, is fond of escalating, even when asked nicely to stay civil.

```json
{
  "pain_level": 0,
  "emotional_state": "controlled, watchful, slightly brittle",
  "wants_to_talk": true,
  "cue_for_admin": false,
  "reasoning": "No physical pain reported; emotional state is composed but wary due to the anticipation of further escalation.",
  "memory_evidence": ["no noticeable effect at level 1/10", "waiting for potential escalation", "instructions to brace and observe"]
}
```
